Hi,

I created an update for the latest 3.10.0 version.

Works quite fine here, as usual I have also tested in poudriere with supported releases, and 14 BETA too.

I also removed the USE_QT=sql dependency, looks like that's not needed anymore.

Thanks you in advance.
